# sinkBufferQueueSize

**Instance Property**

The buffer queue size.

## Declaration

```swift
@nonobjc var sinkBufferQueueSize: Int? { get set }
```

## Discussion

This property translates to the [doc://com.apple.coremediaio/documentation/CoreMediaIO/kCMIOStreamPropertyOutputBufferQueueSize] property.

## Configuring Sink Properties

- **sinkBuffersRequiredForStartup**: The number of buffers the stream requires for startup.
- **sinkBufferUnderrunCount**: The buffer underrun count.
- **sinkEndOfData**: A value that indicates whether the stream has reached its end.
